name: Akumon Summoner
short_description: In Akumon Summoner, you play as Raven, a young summoner. Capture, train, and mutate creatures in this turn-based strategy RPG.
detailed_description:
Akumon Summoner is in active development.
If you're looking for a polished, bug-free, fully balanced game, this is not the right time.
Check reviews or join the Discord if you're unsure. Thank you for your understanding.

In Akumon Summoner, you play as Raven, a talented young summoner determined to prove herself by joining the prestigious Junior Tournament.
Follow her on a coming-of-age journey as she learns to master her powers and faces powerful opponents — all the way to adulthood and the rank of Elite Summoner.

Capture mysterious creatures called Akumons, each with unique abilities, and build a team of 4 fighters ready for any challenge. But be warned: victory lies in the synergy between summoner and Akumons.
Boost their stats or adapt your strategy to exploit enemy weaknesses. In this turn-based RPG, the summoner is just as important as the Akumon.

Before you buy

  • The game is developed by a solo developer

  • Expect bugs, unfinished elements, and ongoing tweaks

  • Some UI elements and animations are still placeholders

  • Monthly updates

  • Steam Input must be disabled for some controllers

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Italian
